hero.description: Unified digital dictionary of the Chechen language — search, morphology, declension, conjugation and API from all major sources

search.placeholder: Enter a word in Chechen or Russian…

description.A: Among the top 2000 most frequent Chechen words — the essential core vocabulary.
description.B: Appears in everyday and literary texts — active vocabulary of an adult native speaker.
description.C: Rare or specialised — present in the corpus, but infrequent.
description.unattested: This word is in the dictionary but wasn't found in our text corpus. Level not yet determined.

disclaimer.title: Levels are approximate
disclaimer.body: Levels are calculated automatically from word frequency in a text corpus (currently Wikipedia). We're expanding the corpus with literature, religious texts and spoken sources to improve accuracy.

features.title: Everything you need to work with the language
features.subtitle: Search, morphology and analysis tools in one place

bilingualSearch.name: Bilingual search
bilingualSearch.desc: Chechen ↔ Russian with trigram ranking and automatic lemmatisation of word forms.

declension.name: Declension
declension.desc: 4 declension types, 8 cases, singular and plural — detected automatically.

conjugation.name: Conjugation
conjugation.desc: 9 tense forms, participles, gerunds, imperative mood and negation.

phraseology.name: Phraseology
phraseology.desc: Search across set expressions and idioms from all 14 sources.

wordLevels.name: Word levels
wordLevels.desc: Every word is tagged by frequency: Common, Standard, Rare, Archaic.

favorites.name: Favorites and history
favorites.desc: Save words, revisit past queries and suggest edits.

morphology.title: Declension and conjugation online
morphology.subtitle: Automatic generation of full paradigms for every word

apiSection.title: REST API for developers
apiSection.description: Integrate the dictionary into your apps — search, morphology, statistics
